$schema_comment: Poster theme catalog. Each entry is selectable via --theme and drives the AI background prompt plus the deterministic text palette. PRs adding themes should keep prompt free of on-image text, logos, faces, or letters.

cyber-gradient.label: Cyber Gradient
cyber-gradient.bg_prompt: dark abstract tech background, neon violet and cyan gradient, circuit line motifs faint at edges, empty center space, no text, no logos

retro-print.label: Retro Print
retro-print.bg_prompt: retro offset print background, muted cream paper, halftone dots, warm red and teal accents, grainy texture, clean center margin, no text, no logos

k-indie-poster.label: K-Indie Poster
k-indie-poster.bg_prompt: Korean indie poster aesthetic, muted pastel color blocks, hand-drawn ink textures, irregular geometric shapes, negative space for copy, no text, no faces, no logos

academic-clean.label: Academic Clean
academic-clean.bg_prompt: minimal academic background, off-white paper, single subtle geometric accent, plenty of margin, serif-friendly layout cues, no text, no logos

festival-vibrant.label: Festival Vibrant
festival-vibrant.bg_prompt: festival poster background, vivid saturated color blocks, confetti-like abstract shapes, high-energy composition, empty central band, no text, no logos, no readable letters

negative_prompt_global: text, letters, typography, faces, people, watermark, logo text, readable words
